---
title: "Implement first Playwright test case (TC_001)"
labels: testing, playwright, enhancement
milestone: v0.1.0
assignees: opencode-qa
---

## 📌 Objective
Develop the first real test case using Playwright and TestNG to validate the framework's end-to-end capabilities.

## 🧪 Test Scenario
- Launch Chromium in headed mode
- Navigate to `https://demoqa.com`
- Click on the **Elements** card
- Click **Text Box** from the left menu
- Fill in:
  - Full Name: `John Doe`
  - Email: `john.doe@test.com`
  - Current Address: `New Delhi, India`
  - Permanent Address: `Bangalore, India`
- Click **Submit**
- Verify that the `#output` div is displayed

## ✅ Definition of Done
- [ ] Test class `TC_001` created under `src/test/java/tests/`
- [ ] TestNG annotations used (`@BeforeTest`, `@Test`, `@AfterTest`)
- [ ] Proper assertions (`Assert.assertTrue`)
- [ ] Playwright version locked to `1.59.0` in `pom.xml`
- [ ] Test passes on local Maven execution (`mvn clean test`)
- [ ] POM validator passes for milestone `v0.1.0`

## 🔗 Dependencies
- Playwright dependency added to `pom.xml`
- TestNG dependency added

## 📝 Notes
- Use `chromium().launch()` with `headless(false)` for visibility during development.
- Include `System.out.println` logs for debugging (will be replaced by Log4j2 in v0.2.0).

---

**Associated PR:** Will be created via `feature-pr.sh` on branch `feature/first-test`
